text: Talents, knowledge and influence that are intangible are transferrable through coaching and mentoring courses. These skills are honed through immersing oneself to education and training programs, like what the College of Contract and Management offers for individuals interested in teaching. It offers a Level 5 diploma programme for people who wishes to start their mentorship skills or the ones hoping to further their education in training other people. https://www.theccm.co.uk/
